author: y4rr
content:
Fixed 6 build errors caused by API drift:
- 5x cuda_graph_decode.rs: stream() now returns Arc<CudaStream> by value, but begin_capture/end_capture/DeviceScalar::new take &Arc<CudaStream>. Added & prefix at call sites.
- 1x main.rs: AdamWConfig gained 'foreach' and 'maximize' fields; changed to use ..Default::default().

Verified: 'cargo run -- test' runs the tiny 108K-param GPT-2 forward+backward sanity check successfully. Model: 2 layers, d_model=64, 4 heads. Forward produces [1, 8, 100] with all finite values; backward computes loss=19.6356 with gradients flowing. ferrotorch-gpt2 is not a git repo so changes are filesystem-local (same as before).
